steps.title: Look up the southern stoplight loosejaw in the table
steps.content: The table indicates this species lives at a depth of 500–2,000 meters below the ocean surface.

steps.title: Match the range to the correct answer
steps.content: Choice C represents the 500–2,000-meter depth range. The other choices either exceed this range (A) or don't match the documented span (B, D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
